tasks.label: Orchestration API: Execute Prompt File
tasks.command:
PROMPT_FILE='${file}'; curl -sS -X POST 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/orchestration/prompt/execute' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @<(${workspaceFolder}/.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import json, os
from pathlib import Path
prompt = Path(os.environ['PROMPT_FILE']).read_text(encoding='utf-8')
payload = {
  'prompt': prompt,
  'include_graph': True,
}
print(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False))
PY
)
